title: Polish Bread Rolls
description: Soft, fluffy bread rolls with a hint of Polish flavors.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine polish, bread, rolls, yeast, and warm water.
2. Mix the dough for 10 minutes until smooth.
3. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl and let it rise for 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough and shape into rolls.
7. Place the rolls on a baking sheet and brush with egg wash.
8. Bake the rolls for 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
9. Let the rolls cool for 5 minutes before serving.
10. Serve warm with toasted butter or jam.
